creator: pav@FreeBSD.org
text:
> * x11/dgs : remove WITH_XORG from pkg-plist and clean the PLIST_SUB
> lines in Makefile

Picking randomly one suggestion - you can't do that! We still support
XFree86 4.X along with X.org ...
